title: 要不要洗头？
titleTranslation_en: Do You Want Your Hair Washed?
description_uz: «Salom, soch oldirmoqchiman.» — sartaroshxonada mijoz va sartarosh o'rtasidagi suhbat. Bu dialog qanday qirqishni tushuntirish, soch yuvishni so'rash, soch uzunligi va salqinlik, natijani ko'rish va narxni so'rashni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Здравствуйте, я хочу подстричься.» — разговор клиента и парикмахера. Диалог тренирует, как объяснить, как подстричь, попросить помыть голову, обсудить длину волос и прохладу, посмотреть результат и спросить цену. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Hi, I'd like a haircut.» — a chat between a customer and a hairdresser. This dialogue practices explaining how you want it cut, asking for a hair wash, talking about length and staying cool, checking the result, and asking the price. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng lǐ fà.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng zuò. Xiǎng zěn me jiǎn?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, please have a seat. How would you like it cut?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 两边短一点，上面修一下。
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng biān duǎn yì diǎn, shàng miàn xiū yí xià.
sentences.text_translation: Yon tomonlarni kaltaroq, tepasini biroz to'g'rilang.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По бокам покороче, сверху немного подровняйте.
sentences.text_translation_en: Shorter on the sides, and just trim the top a bit.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Míng bai le. Yào bu yào xǐ tóu?
sentences.text_translation_en: Got it. Do you want your hair washed?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你头发有点长，多久没剪了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ tóu fa yǒu diǎn cháng, duō jiǔ méi jiǎn le?
sentences.text_translation: Sochingiz biroz uzun, qachondan beri oldirmagansiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У вас волосы длинноваты, давно не стриглись?
sentences.text_translation_en: Your hair's a bit long — how long since your last cut?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 两个多月了，一直没时间。
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng ge duō yuè le, yì zhí méi shí jiān.
sentences.text_translation: Ikki oydan oshdi, hadeb vaqt topolmadim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Больше двух месяцев, всё не было времени.
sentences.text_translation_en: More than two months — I just haven't had the time.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那我帮你剪短一点，凉快。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ bāng nǐ jiǎn duǎn yì diǎn, liáng kuai.
sentences.text_translation: Unda kaltaroq qirqib beray, salqin bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll cut it a bit shorter — it'll feel cooler.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, bié tài duǎn jiù xíng.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Fàng xīn ba. Nǐ kàn kan hòu miàn.
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry. Take a look at the back.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, chuī yí xià jiù hǎo le.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, сейчас высушу феном и всё.
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright, I'll just blow-dry it and we're done.
sentences.speaker: B
